case_title: MARTYR CRISTA L VS DAVIDSON E ROBERT et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MARTYR CRISTA L AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIDSON E ROBERT R E D  STORES LTD A CALIFORNIA CORP BAY PLAY CLUB INC DBA STARSPORT AND SOCIAL CLUB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTYR CRISTA L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT R E D  STORES LTD A CALIFORNIA CORP BAY PLAY CLUB INC DBA STARSPORT AND SOCIAL CLUB $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,208.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
